facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 151 reviews. A 100% pure veg Indian restaurant inside Sunset Town, Phu Quoc.

Maharaja Lounge sits right beside Starbucks near the Kiss Bridge in An Thới. Authentic curries, no meat, no compromise. The kind of place vegetarian travelers usually can't find on this island.

If you're Indian, veg, or just craving real dal and roti after a week of seafood, this is your spot.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Steaming curry, fresh roti, zero meat. Maharaja Lounge in Sunset Town is pulling 4.9 stars for a reason. Pure veg Indian food in Phu Quoc actually exists, and it's right next to the Kiss Bridge.
